column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 禁用,1 启用

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:1 成功,2 失败

column.name: category
column.Comment: 商品种类:0 普通,1 特殊

column.name: status
column.Comment: 审核状态:0 待审核,1 已审核

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 待审核,1 已审核,2 未过审

column.name: user_type
column.Comment: 用户身份:1 super,2 manager,3 keeper,4 driver,5 reviewer

column.name: status
column.Comment: 用户状态:0 禁用,1 启用

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 空闲,1 运输中,2 休息,3 离职

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 禁用,1 启用

column.name: status
column.Comment: 物流状态:1 运输中,2 已送达

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 待入库,1 已入库

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 待出库,1 已出库

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 已解锁,1 上锁中

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态:0 禁用,1 启用
